changes.content:
# Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3H-R1

Mission `ENG-20260722-012832-1285F2` repairs the blocked Workshop archive-key separator while preserving the previously authorized WebUI-only self-knowledge integration. It intercepts only `/api/chat/send` and `/api/chat/stream`, restores the original request stream for pass-through, and leaves Desktop files untouched.

changes.new:
def do_POST(self):
        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_BEGIN
        _sk_route = str(self.path).split("?", 1)[0]
        if _sk_route in {"/api/chat/send", "/api/chat/stream"}:
            import io as _sk_io
            try:
                _sk_len = int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", "0") or "0")
            except Exception:
                _sk_len = 0
            _sk_raw = self.rfile.read(_sk_len) if _sk_len > 0 else b""
            self.rfile = _sk_io.BytesIO(_sk_raw)
            try:
                from pathlib import Path as _sk_Path
                import importlib.util as _sk_importlib_util
                _sk_module_path = _sk_Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py")
                _sk_spec = _sk_importlib_util.spec_from_file_location("foxai_webui_self_knowledge_v1", _sk_module_path)
                _sk_mod = _sk_importlib_util.module_from_spec(_sk_spec)
                _sk_spec.loader.exec_module(_sk_mod)
                _sk_reply = _sk_mod.route_http_request(_sk_raw, _sk_route)
            except Exception:
                _sk_reply = {"intercepted": False, "diagnostic": "self-knowledge adapter unavailable before recognition"}
            if isinstance(_sk_reply, dict) and _sk_reply.get("intercepted") is True:
                _sk_body = bytes(_sk_reply.get("body") or b"")
                self.send_response(int(_sk_reply.get("status_code") or 200))
                self.send_header("Content-Type", str(_sk_reply.get("content_type") or "application/json; charset=utf-8"))
                self.send_header("Cache-Control", "no-cache")
                self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(_sk_body)))
                self.end_headers()
                self.wfile.write(_sk_body)
                return
        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_END

intent: Repair the blocked V1A-3H delivery path without expanding behavior: use a normalized forward-slash live-source path so the Engineering Workshop snapshot archive creates and retrieves the exact member files/core/foxai_web.py, then apply the unchanged WebUI-only integration.
rollback_boundary: Restore core/foxai_web.py and remove only the three new V1A-3H Technical Core files plus the mission-bound V1A-3H-R1 evidence directory.
title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3H-R1 — WebUI Integration Package Payload Repair

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,zipfile
web=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py")
adapter=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py")
assert adapter.is_file() and hashlib.sha256(adapter.read_bytes()).hexdigest()=="a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7"
text=web.read_text(encoding="utf-8"); compile(text,str(web),"exec"); assert text.count("FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_BEGIN")==1
assert "ui\\main_window.py" not in text
snapshot_dir=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-012832-1285F2")
archives=sorted(snapshot_dir.glob("snapshot_*.zip"))
assert archives, "mission snapshot archive missing"
with zipfile.ZipFile(archives[-1],"r") as archive:
    names=set(archive.namelist())
    assert "files/core/foxai_web.py" in names, sorted(name for name in names if name.startswith("files/core"))[:20]
    source=archive.read("files/core/foxai_web.py")
assert len(source)==2351757, len(source)
assert hashlib.sha256(source).hexdigest()=="e4e9fd62e6c4736a18781c6b17184441e8852412867cc95dbca94e570921ba77"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3H_R1_PATCH_AND_SNAPSHOT_MEMBER_OK")
validations.name: Verify adapter, patched WebUI, Desktop isolation, and exact Workshop snapshot source member
Run isolated WebUI integration component self-tests

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py")
# The Workshop already enforced the exact replacement against one unique method locator.
assert p.stat().st_size < 8388608
assert p.read_text(encoding="utf-8").count("FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_BEGIN")==1
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3H_R1_SOURCE_GUARD_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact patched source guard and bounded live-file scope
Build exactly eight WebUI integration evidence outputs
Validate both endpoints, all eleven intents, model bypass, ambiguity, evidence error, and pass-through matrix

argv: import json,pathlib; d=json.loads((pathlib.Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-012832-1285F2_V1A3H_R1_WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION")/"WEBUI_RESPONSE_COMPATIBILITY.json").read_text()); assert "NDJSON" in d["stream"]; print("V1A3H_R1_RESPONSE_OK")
validations.name: Validate JSON and NDJSON response compatibility with one terminal stream event

argv: import json,pathlib; d=json.loads((pathlib.Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-012832-1285F2_V1A3H_R1_WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION")/"WEBUI_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json").read_text()); assert d["existing_live_source_files_modified"]==1 and d["desktop_files_modified"]==0 and not d["network_used"] and not d["packages_installed"] and not d["models_loaded"]; print("V1A3H_R1_SAFETY_OK")
validations.name: Validate rollback boundary, one live source modification, zero Desktop changes, network, packages, models, sockets, and K access
